files.summary: Maven build descriptor for the Java Swing WebSocket client. Targets Java 22. Contains 6 dependencies spanning Tyrus WebSocket client (1.x and 2.x mix), javax.json API/impl. Several dependencies are severely outdated (2013 era).

OpenAPI 3.0.1 specification for a single POST /post endpoint on localhost:8080. Defines PostObject schema with person fields (name, DOB, IBAN, BIC, etc.). Used as contract for the HTTPBin mock backend.
Minimal NPM manifest for the Node.js WebSocket server. Only declares the 'websocket' dependency. Missing: name, version, description, scripts (no start command), engines field.

Node.js WebSocket relay server. Creates an HTTP server on port 1337 and attaches a WebSocket server. Broadcasts every received message to all connected clients. Contains a bug in the close-event handler and uses a stale-index removal pattern.
business_rules: BR-003: All messages broadcast to all clients

method_breakdown.name: http.createServer callback
method_breakdown.purpose: Empty HTTP request handler (does not respond)

method_breakdown.name: wsServer.on('request')
method_breakdown.purpose: Accepts all WebSocket connections, registers message/close handlers

method_breakdown.name: connection.on('message')
method_breakdown.purpose: Receives UTF-8 messages and broadcasts to all clients[]

method_breakdown.name: connection.on('close')
method_breakdown.purpose: Logs disconnect and removes client from array (buggy: wrong param + stale index)

files.summary: Main business component. Provides a person search form, results table, payment recipient table, and a 'Transfer to ALLEGRO' button. Manages WebSocket connection lifecycle and sends JSON messages. Contains hardcoded test data (5 persons with IBANs/BICs).

method_breakdown.name: connect()
method_breakdown.purpose: Opens WebSocket to ws://localhost:1337/ — no error handler

method_breakdown.name: disconnect()
method_breakdown.purpose: Closes socket, clears status and logs

method_breakdown.name: searchPerson()
method_breakdown.purpose: Filters search_space[] by multi-field criteria

method_breakdown.name: sendMessage(e, target)
method_breakdown.purpose: Serialises and sends JSON via WebSocket

method_breakdown.name: selectResult(item)
method_breakdown.purpose: Sets selected_result to clicked row

method_breakdown.name: zahlungsempfaengerSelected(zp)
method_breakdown.purpose: Sets zahlungsempfaenger_selected

files.summary: Monolithic Java Swing application combining UI construction and WebSocket client in a single class. Uses javax.websocket (Tyrus) and javax.json streaming parser. Contains bugs: double panel.add(textArea), verbose manual JSON parsing, static mutable state.
business_rules: BR-003: Target-based message routing in onMessage()

method_breakdown.name: main()
method_breakdown.purpose: Initialises UI and WebSocket connection

method_breakdown.name: initUI()
method_breakdown.purpose: Constructs GridBagLayout Swing form with all text fields

method_breakdown.name: WebsocketClientEndpoint.onOpen()
method_breakdown.purpose: Logs WebSocket open, stores session

method_breakdown.name: WebsocketClientEndpoint.onClose()
method_breakdown.purpose: Logs close, decrements CountDownLatch

method_breakdown.name: WebsocketClientEndpoint.onMessage()
method_breakdown.purpose: Routes message to textarea or textfield population

method_breakdown.name: extract(String json)
method_breakdown.purpose: Manual streaming JSON parse to extract target+content

method_breakdown.name: toSearchResult(String json)
method_breakdown.purpose: Manual streaming JSON parse to SearchResult DTO

files.summary: Generic typed wrapper (ValueModel<T>) holding a single field value with getter/setter. Used by PocModel to store all form field values in an EnumMap.

method_breakdown.name: getField()
method_breakdown.purpose: Returns the wrapped value

method_breakdown.name: setField(T)
method_breakdown.purpose: Sets the wrapped value

files.summary: Enum defining all form field identifiers: TEXT_AREA, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, DATE_OF_BIRTH, ZIP, ORT, STREET, IBAN, BIC, VALID_FROM, FEMALE, MALE, DIVERSE. Acts as the shared key set for the model map.

MVP Model. Holds EnumMap of ValueModel instances for all form fields. Provides action() method that collects all field values and POSTs to HTTPBin. Emits result via EventEmitter. Risk: NPE if any field is null.
business_rules: BR-004: Form submission with all fields (no validation)

method_breakdown.name: action()
method_breakdown.purpose: Collects all model field values into a Map and calls HttpBinService.post()

files.summary: HTTP POST service using legacy HttpURLConnection. Posts JSON body to http://localhost:8080/post. Returns response body as String. Has resource leak (Scanner not closed) and hardcoded URL.

method_breakdown.name: post(Map<String,String> data)
method_breakdown.purpose: Builds JSON from map, POSTs to HTTPBin, returns response body

files.summary: Simple observable event bus. Maintains a List of EventListener subscribers. emit() notifies all listeners synchronously.

method_breakdown.name: subscribe(EventListener)
method_breakdown.purpose: Adds listener to the list

method_breakdown.name: emit(String eventData)
method_breakdown.purpose: Notifies all subscribers with event data

files.summary: Empty placeholder class. No fields, methods, or documentation. Dead code — should be removed.

MVP View. Owns all Swing widgets (JTextField for name/DOB/address/IBAN/BIC, JRadioButton for gender, JTextArea for results, JButton for submit). Constructs GridBagLayout form in initUI(). Contains double panel.add(textArea) bug.
business_rules: BR-005: Gender radio button defaults to female

method_breakdown.name: PocView()
method_breakdown.purpose: Constructor calls initUI()

method_breakdown.name: initUI()
method_breakdown.purpose: Creates and lays out all Swing components in GridBagLayout

files.summary: MVP Presenter. Wires PocView widgets to PocModel via DocumentListener (text fields) and ChangeListener (radio buttons). Button action listener calls model.action(). Subscribes to EventEmitter to update the view on HTTP response.

method_breakdown.name: PocPresenter(PocView, PocModel, EventEmitter)
method_breakdown.purpose: Sets up event subscription and button listener, calls initializeBindings()

method_breakdown.name: bind(JTextComponent, ModelProperties)
method_breakdown.purpose: Attaches DocumentListener to sync text field to model

method_breakdown.name: bind(JRadioButton, ModelProperties)
method_breakdown.purpose: Attaches ChangeListener to sync radio button state to model

method_breakdown.name: initializeBindings()
method_breakdown.purpose: Calls bind() for all fields defined in ModelProperties
